title: ceratostylis leucantha
intro: Ceratostylis leucantha, also known as the White Lip Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ceratostylis leucantha include its potential in reducing fever, alleviating pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ceratostylis leucantha can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and dried powder, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
